headline: Netflix Sets Leonardo Sbaraglia-Starring Film ‘El Sobrino’ From ‘Wild Tales’ Director Damián Szifron
snapshot: Legendary Italian actor Franco Nero will also make a "special appearance" in the movie about a renowned pianist who discovers that the musical talent of his young nephew "could surpass his own."
